comment: LA County agencies — v1 launch metro. Day 1 (structure) seed populated; day 2 (2026-05-12) populated tip_route_kind + tip_url + tip_url_template for LASD/LAPD/LBPD against LA Crime Stoppers (P3 ID 365) per docs/research/p3-prefill-probe.md. routing_last_verified_at stays null on all rows until day-3 callbacks confirm receipt — the per-row notes mark which routes are working-assumption vs verified.

agencies.name: Los Angeles County Sheriff's Department
agencies.notes: Homicide Bureau owns most county-jurisdiction cold cases. Day-2 (2026-05-12): routes via LA Crime Stoppers, P3 affiliate ID 365. Direct verification against lasd.org WAF-blocked from the probe environment; working assumption from docs/05_TIP_ROUTING.md + the county-level Crime Stoppers serving the entire LA County. Day-3 callback to LASD Homicide pending — flip routing_last_verified_at on confirmation. See docs/research/p3-prefill-probe.md for the affiliate-ID lookup.

agencies.name: Los Angeles Police Department
agencies.notes: Robbery-Homicide Division owns most city-jurisdiction cold cases. Day-2 (2026-05-12): routes via LA Crime Stoppers, P3 affiliate ID 365 (same portal as LASD). Direct verification against lapdonline.org WAF-blocked; working assumption per docs/05_TIP_ROUTING.md + the county-Crime-Stoppers coverage model. Day-3 callback pending. See docs/research/p3-prefill-probe.md.

agencies.name: Long Beach Police Department
agencies.notes: Day-2 (2026-05-12) correction: LBPD uses LA Crime Stoppers (P3 ID 365), NOT a separate Long Beach Crime Stoppers affiliate. Confirmed directly via longbeach.gov/police — the page's Submit-a-Tip button links to p3tips.com/TipForm.aspx?ID=365. The 'separate LB affiliate' assumption in the pre-launch architecture review was wrong as of this date. Day-3 callback pending. See docs/research/p3-prefill-probe.md.

agencies.name: Santa Monica Police Department
agencies.notes: Independent of LASD. May not have a P3 affiliate — likely routes via agency_form (web) or agency_phone. Determine in day-2 research.

agencies.name: Pasadena Police Department
agencies.notes: Has its own anonymous tip system per architecture review. Likely tip_route_kind=agency_form. URL pending day-2 verification.

agencies.name: Beverly Hills Police Department
agencies.notes: Independent. May not have a P3 affiliate. Pending verification.

agencies.name: Los Angeles County District Attorney's Bureau of Investigation
agencies.notes: DA's Bureau of Investigation owns a small subset of cases that would otherwise be LASD's. Different tip pathway than LASD Homicide. Day-3 callback to confirm whether they accept public tips on cold cases at all, or whether everything routes through the original investigating agency.

agencies.name: FBI Los Angeles Field Office
agencies.notes: tips.fbi.gov is the federal tip portal — well-publicized and stable. Phone (1-800-CALL-FBI) deliberately left null pending verification of cold-case-specific routing for the LA field office. tip_url_template: null — tips.fbi.gov is a single intake page without per-case prefill support; the P3 prefill mechanism doesn't apply.
